nasb.text: Then they will be dismayed and ashamed because of Cush their hope and Egypt their boast.

esv.text: Then they shall be dismayed and ashamed because of Cush their hope and of Egypt their boast.

cnv.text: 以色列人必因他們所仰望的古實和他們所誇耀的埃及，驚惶羞愧。

ccb.text: 那些仰赖古实、仗着埃及夸口的人必惊恐羞愧。

csbs.text: 那些仰望库实、以埃及为荣的，都必惊惶羞愧。
